title: canarium megacarpum
intro: Canarium megacarpum, also known as the large-fruited canarium, is a plant species belonging to the family Burseraceae. It is traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal effects. The health benefits of Canarium megacarpum include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and promoting wound healing, making it a valuable remedy for various ailments. Herbal preparations of Canarium megacarpum often include infusions, decoctions, and resin extracts, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
